content.json:
# MDE Drift Report

All configuration drift across P0/P1/P2/P5/P7 categories, unioned and enriched with AuditLogs attribution.

content.title: Drift events over time, by category
content.query:
union
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h) | extend Category = "P0 Config"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 30m) | extend Category = "P1 Pipeline"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P2 Governance"),
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P5 Identity"),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d) | extend Category = "P7 Metadata")
| summarize Changes = count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

content.title: Recent drift events (all categories)
content.query:
union
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1h)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 30m)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d)),
  (MDE_Drift_Inventory({TimeRange:value}, 1d)),
  (MDE_Drift_Configuration({TimeRange:value}, 1d))
| project TimeGenerated, StreamName, EntityId, FieldName, OldValue, NewValue, ChangeType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
